# Ivaylo Djounov — Fine Art Photographer

> Ivaylo Djounov is a fine art photographer based in Varna, Bulgaria, specialising in nightscapes and astrophotography, landscapes, seascapes (sunsets and sunrises), wildlife, and travel photography. This site presents his photographic galleries, a journal, and contact details.

## About
- Name: Ivaylo Djounov
- Role: Fine art photographer
- Based in: Varna, Bulgaria
- Disciplines: nightscape & astrophotography, landscape, seascape (sunsets & sunrises), wildlife, travel, street
- Website: https://ivaylodj.com
- About: https://ivaylodj.com/about.html
- Contact: https://ivaylodj.com/contacts.html

## Galleries
- Portfolio index: https://ivaylodj.com/portfolio/
- Nightscapes: https://ivaylodj.com/portfolio/nightscapes.html
- Comet NEOWISE: https://ivaylodj.com/portfolio/neowise.html
- Sunsets: https://ivaylodj.com/portfolio/sunsets.html
- Sunrises: https://ivaylodj.com/portfolio/sunrises.html
- Birds & Wildlife: https://ivaylodj.com/portfolio/birds.html
- Various: https://ivaylodj.com/portfolio/unsorted.html
- Vera Su (shipwreck, Bulgarian Black Sea coast): https://ivaylodj.com/portfolio/vera-su.html
- Varna — Day of Varna 2019: https://ivaylodj.com/portfolio/varna/day-of-varna-2019.html
- Varna — Day of Varna 2020: https://ivaylodj.com/portfolio/varna/day-of-varna-2020.html
- Varna — Funfair (Summer): https://ivaylodj.com/portfolio/varna/funfair-summer.html
- Varna — Funfair (Winter): https://ivaylodj.com/portfolio/varna/funfair-winter.html
- Seasons — Spring: https://ivaylodj.com/portfolio/seasons/spring.html
- Seasons — Autumn: https://ivaylodj.com/portfolio/seasons/autumn.html
- World Travels — Namibia: https://ivaylodj.com/portfolio/world-travels/namibia-2021.html
- World Travels — Morocco: https://ivaylodj.com/portfolio/world-travels/morocco.html
- Europe — Rome: https://ivaylodj.com/portfolio/europe-travels/rome.html
- Europe — La Ciotat: https://ivaylodj.com/portfolio/europe-travels/la-ciotat.html
